task_completion.description: Load the ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp shapefile into QGIS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGIS Layers panel shows a layer named 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' and the map canvas displays a map of the world.

task_completion.description: Run the topological coloring algorithm to generate a 'color_id' field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Topological coloring' processing tool dialog is visible and configured with a minimum of 4 colors, or the attribute table for the layer is open showing a newly created 'color_id' column with integer values.

task_completion.description: Apply categorized symbology to the layer based on the 'color_id' field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Layer Properties dialog shows 'Symbology' set to 'Categorized' with the Value field set to 'color_id'. The map canvas should display the world map with countries colored in at least 4 distinct colors, where adjacent countries do not share the same color.

task_completion.description: Export the resulting colored layer as a GeoJSON file to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Vector Layer as...' dialog is visible with the Format set to 'GeoJSON' and the File name set to '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/world_colored.geojson', or a file manager/terminal shows this file has been created.

task_completion.description: Save the QGIS project as world_map_colored.qgz in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGIS main window title bar displays 'world_map_colored' or 'world_map_colored.qgz', or a 'Save Project' dialog is visible with the path '/home/ga/GIS_Data/projects/world_map_colored.qgz'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the QGIS graphical user interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the QGIS application open with menus, dialogs, and panels being actively used, rather than just terminal windows running automated scripts.

integrity.description: The map displays a genuine topological coloring rather than random or uniform colors.
integrity.visual_evidence: The map canvas shows distinct color classes where borders between adjacent countries clearly separate different colors, indicating the algorithm was actually run and applied.

integrity.description: The agent used the exact file paths requested in the task description.
integrity.visual_evidence: Save dialogs or terminal outputs explicitly show the paths '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/world_colored.geojson' and '/home/ga/GIS_Data/projects/world_map_colored.qgz' being typed or selected.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source shapefile is located at /home/ga/GIS_Data/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp. The topological coloring algorithm must generate a field named 'color_id' which is used for the categorized symbology. The expected GeoJSON output must be saved exactly to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/world_colored.geojson. The QGIS project must be saved exactly to /home/ga/GIS_Data/projects/world_map_colored.qgz.
